const products= [
    {
        "id":1,
        "name":"coke",
        "qty": 20,
        "imageO1":"images/img64.png",
        "image02":"images/img56.png",
        "price" : 340,
        "category":["dessert","lunch"],
        "sizes":["small","large","medium"],
        "desc":"loremfsafkasfkjlk"
    },
    {
        "id" :2,
        "name":"pepsi",
        "qty": 20,
        "image":"images/img57.png",
        "price":370,
        "category":["dessert","lunch"],
        "sizes":["small","large","medium"]
    },
    {
        "id":3,
        "name":"water",
        "qty": 20,
        "image":"images/img58.png",
        "price":250,
        "category":["dinner","breakfast"],
        "sizes":["small","large","medium"]
    },
    {
        "id":4,
        "name":"hamburger",
        "qty": 40,
        "price":130,
        "image":"images/img59.png",
        "category":["dinner","breakfast"],
        "sizes":["small","large","medium"]
    },
    {
        "id":5,
        "name":"fries",
        "qty": 20,
        "image":"images/img60.png",
        "price":100,
        "category":["freshfood","lunch"],
        "sizes":["small","large","medium"]
    },
    {
        "id":6,
        "name":"pizza",
        "qty": 20,
        "image":"images/img61.png",
        "price":[70,360,130],
        "category":["freshfood","lunch"],
        "sizes":["small","large","medium"]
    },
    {
        "id":7,
        "name":"chess pasta",
        "qty": 20,
        "image":"images/img62.png",
        "price":170,
        "category":["lunch","breakfast"],
        "sizes":["small","large","medium"]
    },
    {
        "id":8,
        "name":"coffe",
        "qty": 20,
        "image":"images/img63.png",
        "price":70,
        "category":["lunch","breakfast"],
        "sizes":["small","large","medium"]
    }
]

export default products;
